The '''Sal-Solo Estate''' was [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'s home during his time as [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. A former [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] safehouse, it was located a kilometer from the government center of [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]]. The estate was completely flat, covered by a blue clover and with the only building being his home itself. The building was a four-story-tall dome of [[Duracrete/Legends|duracrete]] painted blue-green. The estate was surrounded by a tall duracrete wall, and the interior was ringed with various sensors.

The building had no windows; instead, there were [[Holocamera/Legends|holocams]] on the outside which projected images of the outside to panels on the interior. The only entrances were opening slabs of [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]], two of which could admit [[Landspeeder/Legends|speeders]]. It had its own power generator, and its water and sewage pipes were deliberately small enough so that no one could enter through them.

During [[Operation Roundabout]], [[Tiu Zax]] entered the building, staying inside doing reconnaissance work for several days before being retrieved by [[Mara Jade Skywalker]].
